summary: GharSetu Iteration 9 - Voice Search Fix and Saved Reels Feature Verification. All requested features working: Voice Search button opens modal (not redirect), Voice Search modal shows mic button and example queries, Saved Reels tab visible in User Dashboard, Saved Reels displays videos with thumbnails, Remove button works. Backend APIs all passing.
passed_tests: === VOICE SEARCH BUTTON - FIXED ===
Voice Search button (data-testid='voice-search-trigger') found: PASSED
Voice Search button click does NOT redirect (URL unchanged): PASSED
Voice Search Modal opens with data-testid='voice-search-modal': PASSED
Mic button visible in modal: PASSED
Example queries visible ('2 BHK flat in Surat', 'Office space for rent', 'Hotels near Dumas', 'Plumber in Adajan'): PASSED
'Tap the mic and say what you're looking for' instruction text: PASSED
=== SAVED REELS - USER DASHBOARD ===
Saved Reels tab visible in sidebar with bookmark icon: PASSED
Saved Reels tab shows count badge (1): PASSED
Saved Reels section displays saved videos: PASSED
Saved reel card has video thumbnail: PASSED
Saved reel card shows title ('rent'): PASSED
Saved reel card shows views (29) and likes (3): PASSED
Remove button (trash icon) visible on hover: PASSED
Remove button functionality works (card removed after click): PASSED
=== BACKEND API TESTS (8/8 PASSED) ===
Login with test credentials: PASSED
GET /api/videos/saved returns user's saved videos: PASSED
GET /api/videos returns available videos: PASSED
POST /api/videos/{id}/save saves video: PASSED
DELETE /api/videos/{id}/save unsaves video: PASSED
Re-save video for UI testing: PASSED
Authentication required for /api/videos/saved (returns 401/403): PASSED
Non-existent video returns 404: PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Voice Search button event handling properly fixed with stopImmediatePropagation, mousedown/touchstart handlers, and z-index
Saved Reels section correctly implemented in UserDashboard with SavedReelCard component
Backend API endpoints for saved videos working correctly
Minor: Mixed content warning for Cloudinary thumbnail (HTTP vs HTTPS) - not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Video saved for test user during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Search button now opens modal (not redirect). Saved Reels tab added to User Dashboard with full CRUD functionality. Backend APIs tested and working. Test user has one saved video after testing.

Voice_Search_Button.details: Click opens modal (NOT redirect), uses stopImmediatePropagation, mousedown/touchstart handlers, z-index fix

Voice_Search_Modal.details: data-testid='voice-search-modal', shows mic button, example queries ('2 BHK flat in Surat', etc.)

Saved_Reels_Tab.details: Visible in User Dashboard sidebar with bookmark icon and count badge

Saved_Reels_Display.details: Shows saved videos with thumbnails, title, views, likes

Saved_Reels_Remove.details: Trash icon button removes video from saved list

mocked_apis.note: Video upload uses demo URL when Cloudinary not configured (from iteration 8)
